title: Ministerial orders appointing directors to the board of the College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants - Canada.ca
content:
## Ministerial orders appointing directors to the board of the College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants
The Ministerial Orders in this section appoint directors to the board of the College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants.

### Ministerial Order: Directors to the Board of the College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants
The Minister of Citizenship and Immigration, pursuant to subsections 17(3) and 85(3) of the College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants Act , hereby appoints Timothy D’Souza, Jennifer Henry, France Houle, Ben Rempel and Marc Spector to be directors of the board of directors of the College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants to hold office during good behaviour for a term of up to two years, beginning March 7, 2026, and anticipated to end March 6, 2028.
Keywords: ministerial order, appointment, board of directors, college of immigration and citizenship consultants, immigration consultants, college of immigration and citizenship consultants act, minister of citizenship and immigration, cicc, citizenship and immigration, immigration minister, immigration refugees and citizenship canada, immigration oversight
